data.body: LIVE-JIRA VALIDATION PROBE (authorized 2026-07-03): validating level-triggered binding-walk reconciler against production Jira (REB). Plan: (1) read-only reconcile-check + dry-run [cap 0, no mutation]; (2) scoped mutating probes per drift class via --filter-local-ids on throwaway tickets, all deleted after. Env: navasage.atlassian.net / joeoakhart.
